title: Tuque Strategy Optimizer Cron Review - Blocked on Missing Files
summary: A cron job was triggered to review trading engine metrics for aggressive and conservative books, but execution blocked because tuque_dashboard and paper_engine.py were missing from the workspace.
todos: Locate the correct paths for tuque_dashboard/data/state.json and paper_engine.py
Re-run the cron analysis once the file paths are confirmed
user_preferences: Include version notes in code comments and dashboard notes
Maintain distinction between aggressive and conservative models
Log action events summarizing changes and rationale
Do not send chat updates unless the change is high-impact or blocked
followups: User needs to provide the correct repository location or file paths for tuque_dashboard and paper_engine.py
